category_sources: source_facts.description says decentralized SQL database with blockchain features; official README says CovenantSQL is a Byzantine Fault Tolerant relational database built on SQLite.
display_name_sources: Official repository name is CovenantSQL/CovenantSQL; official homepage and docs use CovenantSQL.
docs_sources: Official developers.covenantsql.io docs provide intro and overview; official GitHub README links to those docs and includes quick start.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied as https://github.com/CovenantSQL/CovenantSQL; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README topics/about identify SQL database, blockchain, decentralized, p2p, and dbaas concepts.
